operator.name: AtracsysCameraOp
operator.description: Optional live-camera operators for Atracsys hardware, including the master source and structured-light point-cloud conversion path.

changelog.0.1.0: Initial optional live Atracsys camera operator package.

hardware.name: Atracsys camera
hardware.description: Atracsys hardware is required for live mode.

software.name: Atracsys SDK, S3DK, and CUDA-enabled OpenCV
software.description: The live camera operator depends on the vendor SDKs plus an OpenCV build with CUDA support.
